ddt:Target.Name: IDM_UDS_All_V12
ddt:Target.Description:
<N> 2016/09/12 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation. Gerome Deckert New SW6.1 for PPC RCA1007 V00
Badreddine EL HANOUCH 17/10/2018 : New SW5.1 for PT1 RCA1006 V00 Add of new Request paramater: ACC_TRG_Torque
18/04/2018 Update of version of Logiciel :V1 to V3
10/04/2018 correction of paramaters 0546 & 0547 ( 2 bits).
08/03/2018 Update of logiciel reference and version according to SW4.1
02/02/2018 : V5.6: Update DATA resolution (mARB_Xxxxxx)
29/11/2017 : V5.5 : correction auto ident
29/11/2017 : V5.4 : correction auto ident
21/11/2017 V5.1==> V5.2 Correction of Logiciel & Version value
06/10/2017 V4 ==> V5 Update of the DATA base and add all DID needed.
16/06/2017 : Add of "Rapport de maintenabilité" to all $22 services Delete of DTCs : 5B9E and 5B9F.
27/05/2021: Change unit for DID 220116 from "g" to "m/s²"

Data.Name: Steering Wheel angle corrected value from VDC
VDC Operating Condition.VDC Activation Status
Data.Comment: Stte of VDC activation by driver

Data.Name: YLE_ADA_BSB Operation Status.BSB Display Status on the Meter

Item.Text: Brake Hold activated (assist start of vehicle)

Data.Name: TBD_EPB_IDMfail_EPBFail.SSA_Received_EPB_State
Data.Comment: state of EPB given by EPKB ECU

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: SSA Button switch.SSA Button Switch
Data.Comment: State of IDM input Swich for SSA function

Data.Name: SSA Button switch.SSA switch LED 2
Data.Comment: IDM request to light on the SSA LED

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Master warning lamp lights up request
Control Module Malf and Gade.Control Module Malf
Front and Rear G sesnor Value
EPB_SSA status_TBD.DataRead.SSA lamp lighting request flag
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Request.Name: DataRead.Steering Wheel angle corrected value from VDC

DataItem.Name: Steering Wheel angle corrected value from VDC

Request.Name: DataRead.Front and Rear G sesnor Value

DataItem.Name: Front and Rear G sesnor Value

Request.Name: DataRead.Master warning lamp lights up request

DataItem.Name: Master warning lamp lights up request
EPB_SSA status_TBD.DataRead.SSA lamp lighting request flag
YLE_ADA_BSB Operation Status.BSB Display Status on the Meter

Request.Name: Control Module Malf and Gade.Control Module Malf

DataItem.Name: Control Module Malf and Gade.Control Module Malf
